title: STATUS Roseville 2 Slice Toaster – 750 W, Stainless Steel, Variable Browning, Removable Crumb Tray (2SLSSTROSEVILLX4)
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 750W Performance: The Status Roseville 2 Slice Toaster provides efficient toasting with a 750W power output, ensuring quick and even results every time.
Sleek Stainless Steel Design: Crafted with a robust stainless steel exterior, the toaster adds a modern and stylish touch to your kitchen decor.
Variable Browning Control: Includes an adjustable browning control dial, allowing you to select the perfect level of toast crispness according to your preference.
Removable Crumb Tray: The toaster features a convenient removable crumb tray, making it easy to clean and maintain by collecting crumbs that fall during toasting.
Compact and Practical: Designed to toast two slices, the Status Roseville toaster is perfect for smaller kitchens, offering both functionality and a space-saving solution.
description: Roseville - Toaster - 750w - 2 Slice - Stainless Steel - Status - Variable Browning Control - Removable Crumb Tray - Cancel Function - 1 pk - in Glossy Retail Box

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Cool Wall, Defrost Mode, Eject Button, Reheat Mode
